serviceNotes.micro filter: Cabin (micro) filter per BMW i4 EU maintenance / CBS planning—confirm regional booklet.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24 months; hygroscopic fluid still ages despite strong regenerative braking.
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Strong regen extends pad life; inspections still required per CBS.
serviceNotes.vehicle check: BMW inspection service for high-voltage vehicles; use a qualified workshop.
serviceNotes.high-voltage battery coolant: Battery and e-drive cooling circuits; BMW specifies periodic coolant service—120,000 km is a common EU planning figure; confirm HV supplement.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: E-drive cooling circuit preventive planning; confirm official data for your model year.
serviceNotes.gearbox fluid: Reduction gear / drive unit: often labelled lifetime; ~100,000 km preventive exchange is a specialist recommendation. Electric AWD uses motor-driven axles—no ICE-style transfer case fluid.
